text:
(a) The department may adopt rules to administer this chapter, including rules that:

(1) waive the payment of fees if a dealer has gone out of business and the applicant can show that fees were paid to the dealer; and

(2) allow full and partial refunds for rejected titling and registration transactions.

(b) The department may collect from a person making a transaction with the department using the state electronic Internet portal project a fee set under Section 2054.2591 (Fees) , Government Code. All fees collected under this subsection shall be allocated to the department to provide for the department’s costs associated with administering Section 2054.2591 (Fees) , Government Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.003 — Rules; Fees; Refunds

(a) The department may adopt rules to administer this chapter, including rules that:

    (1) waive the payment of fees if a dealer has gone out of business and the applicant can show that fees were paid to the dealer; and

    (2) allow full and partial refunds for rejected titling and registration transactions.

(b) The department may collect from a person making a transaction with the department using the state electronic Internet portal project a fee set under Section 2054.2591 (Fees) , Government Code. All fees collected under this subsection shall be allocated to the department to provide for the department’s costs associated with administering Section 2054.2591 (Fees) , Government Code.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 86, eff. September 1, 2013.*

allow full and partial refunds for rejected titling and registration transactions.

All fees collected under this subsection shall be allocated to the department to provide for the department’s costs associated with administering Section 2054.2591 (Fees) , Government Code.
